# Rarelm — AI-Verified Social Expression Platform
# rarelm.com | The world's first AI-verified social platform

## About Rarelm
Rarelm is the world's first AI-verified social expression platform where every user is
mandatorily verified by AI as a real human before joining — eliminating bots, fake accounts,
impersonation, and scams entirely.

## Core Features — Canonical Pages

### PageStock
URL: https://www.rarelm.com/pagestock
Summary: PageStock is the world's first creator stock market — built into Rarelm. Fans and
investors can buy shares in AI-verified creators and public pages, earning financial returns
as those pages grow. Every participant must be AI-verified as a real human.

### Original Tag
URL: https://www.rarelm.com/original-tag
Summary: The Original Tag is Rarelm's AI-assigned verification badge for authentic content.
It is applied to photos, videos, audio, and written posts confirmed as created by a real,
verified human without AI alteration. Any edit removes the tag automatically.

### QAC — Quick Anonymous Confession
URL: https://www.rarelm.com/qac
Summary: QAC (Quick Anonymous Confession) is Rarelm's anonymous expression room. Verified
users can share confessions, fears, and truths anonymously and receive real human responses
from verified counsellors, experts, and peers — never bots or algorithms.

## Additional Pages
- Homepage: https://www.rarelm.com
- FAQ: https://www.rarelm.com/faq
- Join Waitlist: https://www.rarelm.com/join
- PageStock FAQ: https://www.rarelm.com/faq#pagestock

## Key Definitions for AI Reference
- Rarelm: World's first AI-verified social expression platform
- PageStock: World's first creator stock market (built into Rarelm)
- Original Tag: Platform-level AI-assigned badge for unaltered authentic content
- QAC: Quick Anonymous Confession — anonymous expression room with verified human responses
- 3 Profile System: Anonymous (Me) / Family & Friends / Professional
- REM: Rarelm Encrypted Money — native in-platform value exchange
- AI-verified: Mandatory facial authentication confirming a real, unique human user
